title: saasaloy-lock.json — resolved module provenance
description: Machine-owned lock at a generated project's root: for every installed module, the registry source it came from, the ref requested, and the exact commit SHA resolved — so a re-install reproduces identical bytes. The npm-style lock to saasaloy.json's intent (build spec §2.11; ADR 0012). Integrity is the commit SHA itself; there is no separate integrity field.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema for editor validation.

lockfileVersion.description: Lock format version; bumped only on a breaking shape change.

modules.description: Module name → the source it was resolved from. Holds the full resolved graph (dependencies included), not just the top-level asks.

source.description: Registry source slug: `owner/repo` for a remote GitHub source, or `local` for a SAASALOY_REGISTRY_DIR checkout.

ref.description: The ref requested (branch/tag/SHA), or `local` for a local checkout.

resolved.description: The exact commit SHA the ref resolved to — the integrity anchor. `local` for a local checkout.

dependsOn.description: The module's declared dependencies, recorded so the resolved graph is self-describing.
